title: Crumbly Chinese Penne Crumble
description: A rich and crumbly post-workout dish featuring penne pasta mixed with a savory sauce that's easy to digest.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 350°F (180°C). Rinse the pasta under cold water.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the olive oil, minced garlic, soy sauce, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
Add the Parmesan cheese if using, and mix it in gently so you don't break up the crumbly texture of the cheese.
Toss the pasta with the marinade until evenly coated. Spread the pasta out on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Sprinkle sesame seeds over the top for added texture and flavor. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown and crunchy.
Serve warm as a quick snack during or after your workout.
